summary: Foglio Lavoro PDF Feature Testing Complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) GET /api/commesse/{id}/foglio-lavoro returns 401 without auth, 2) Endpoint returns 401/404 for non-existent commessa, 3) PDF generation via direct Python import works correctly, 4) Generated PDF is >5KB (not empty), 5) QR code generation works, 6) All required libraries (qrcode, reportlab) available, 7) Route exists in commesse router, 8) Endpoint uses require_role RBAC protection, 9) FASI_STANDARD contains all 11 expected production phases, 10) PDF does not include financial data fields. Frontend code review confirmed: CommessaActionsMenu has data-testid='menu-foglio-lavoro', accepts onDownloadFoglioLavoro prop, and CommessaHubPage passes the handler correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint correctly uses require_role RBAC with roles: admin, amministrazione, ufficio_tecnico, officina
PDF generation uses ReportLab and qrcode libraries correctly
FASI_STANDARD contains 11 production phases with RIGHE_PER_FASE=3 rows each
QR code points to /commesse/{id}?tab=produzione for workshop access
PDF excludes financial data (value, totals) - only includes: numero, client_name, description, normativa_tipo, classe_esecuzione
Frontend CommessaActionsMenu correctly implements menu item under 'Officina' section
Frontend uses downloadPdfBlob utility for PDF download with proper filename

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - cannot test download flow without Google OAuth auth

seed_data_creation: Used existing commessa IDs: com_e8c4810ad476 (NF-2026-000001), com_a9450707e479
context_for_next_testing_agent: Foglio Lavoro PDF feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint at GET /api/commesse/{id}/foglio-lavoro returns PDF with QR code, production phases table, and empty rows for manual time entry. No financial data included. Frontend menu item has data-testid='menu-foglio-lavoro' under 'Genera Documenti' dropdown.
